sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not substring(GL,6,2) in ('01','02','04','05')
update TransX set GL = '9999999' from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on substring(GL,1,5) = ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'Tax GL' and Descr = '9999999'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '9999999'
update TransX set TP = '', Contract = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,5) <> '35840'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '3545502'
update TransX set Fsitem = GL, Amt2 = 0 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Amt2 = -Amt1 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,6,2) in ('04','05') and not Amt1 is NULL
update TransX set Amt2 = -Amt1*0.21 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,6,2) in ('01','02') and not Amt1 is NULL
update TransX set FSitem = substring(GL,1,5) + '04' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '%01'
update TransX set FSitem = substring(GL,1,5) + '05' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '%02'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Fsitem, Amt1, Amt2, Flex6) (Select KeyID, Co, GL,FSitem, round(sum(Amt1),0) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),0) as Amt2, 'pass1' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, FSitem)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex6 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Flex1) (select '[batchID]-data2',Field1,Descr from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'Review Notes' and ID = 'M12')

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Amt1) values ('[batchID]',
